questions.q: Which of the following is a primary function of the United Nations Economic and Social Council (ECOSOC)?
Describe the role of the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP) in promoting sustainable development.
questions.answer: UNDP plays a crucial role in promoting sustainable development by providing technical assistance, capacity-building, and policy advice to countries.

questions.q: What is the significance of the concept of collective security in the context of the United Nations?
questions.answer: The concept of collective security is significant in the context of the United Nations as it emphasizes the shared responsibility of member states to maintain international peace and security.

questions.q: Fill in the blank: The United Nations General Assembly (UNGA) is the supreme deliberative organ of the United Nations, and it consists of representatives from all member states.
True or False: The United Nations Security Council (UNSC) has the power to make laws for its member states.
What are the main functions of the United Nations Children's Fund (UNICEF)?
questions.answer: The main functions of UNICEF include promoting the rights and well-being of children, providing humanitarian assistance, and advocating for child protection.

questions.q: Describe the role of the International Labour Organization (ILO) in promoting social justice.
questions.answer: The ILO plays a crucial role in promoting social justice by setting international labour standards, providing technical assistance, and advocating for workers' rights.

questions.q: Fill in the blank: The United Nations Security Council (UNSC) has a total of _______________ members.
True or False: The United Nations Human Rights Council (UNHRC) has the power to impose sanctions on countries that violate human rights.
What is the significance of the concept of humanitarian intervention in the context of the United Nations?
questions.answer: The concept of humanitarian intervention is significant in the context of the United Nations as it emphasizes the responsibility of the international community to protect civilians from human rights violations.
